feat.name: Shoulder Check
feat.text: You hit a foe with your armor to throw them off balance. Make a fist Strike even if you don't have a hand free; if you're wielding a gauntlet or spiked gauntlet, you can make a Strike with one of those weapons instead. The Strike gains the following additional results.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

feat.critical_success: The target is off-guard against melee attacks you attempt against it until the end of your next turn.
feat.success: The target is off-guard against the next melee attack you attempt against it before the end of your current turn.
feat.critical_failure: You are off-guard against melee attacks the target attempts against you until the end of your next turn.
